name: USS YMS-300 (YMS-300)
events: 5 Mar 1945 USS Bullhead (T/Cdr. W.T. Griffith, USN) and USS Seahorse (Cdr. H.H. Greer, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR) and USS YMS-300 (Lt. R.A. Woods, USNR)

2 Apr 1945 USS Searaven (T/Lt.Cdr. T.M. Ustick, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS Seagull (T/Lt. W.S. Hall, USN) and USS YMS-300 (Lt. R.A. Woods, USNR). (1)
